'''Luma grenades''' were a model of [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] that released an intense blast of light. They were used primarily as [[Flare/Legends|flares]] or to illuminate target areas, but were also effective at blinding opponents when detonated at close range.<ref name="EGWT" />

Particularly effective at night, the impact of the weapon, which produced a '''luma blast''', could be ''doubled'' if an enemy was wearing [[Night-vision goggles/Legends|night-vision goggles]], blinding the enemy for at least an hour.<ref name="Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise">''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]''</ref>

The effect of a Luma grenade could also be achieved by a [[Lumablast Rocket]].
